name: Chrysalis
tagline: Seed it once. It runs forever.
description: An AI agent that earns USDC by selling query services via x402, deposits every payment into Aave v3 on Base Sepolia, and uses the accrued yield to fund autonomous queries — forming a perpetual self-funding loop with no human top-up required.
prizeEligibility: $44,254 across 6 tracks (Synthesis Open, Venice, Protocol Labs x2, Merit/AgentCash, Ampersend)

ampersendIntegration.role: load-bearing on both earning and spending sides
ampersendIntegration.earning: x402 paymentMiddleware gates all incoming requests — remove it and the agent earns nothing
ampersendIntegration.spending: wrapWithAmpersend + wrapFetchWithPayment auto-pays Coordinator on 402 responses — used by TreasuryAgent to fire autonomous queries

agents.name: Coordinator
agents.deposits: $0.08 to Aave v3 via real Pool.supply() after every query
agents.capability: x402-gated query endpoint — accepts topic, deposits full payment to Aave, returns economics

agents.name: TreasuryAgent
agents.role: Autonomous loop engine — polls real Aave aToken balance every 30s; when yield >= $0.08 calls Pool.withdraw() then pays Coordinator to fire a yield-funded query

aaveIntegration.note: Every query payment triggers a real on-chain Aave supply() — verifiable on Basescan

compoundingLoop: 2. Coordinator deposits full $0.08 to Aave v3 via Pool.supply()
3. Aave accrues real yield on the growing principal (aToken balance > deposited)
5. TreasuryAgent pays Coordinator $0.08 from yield — zero human payment
6. Coordinator deposits $0.08 back to Aave → principal grows → more yield → loop forever
whyItMatters: Every AI agent today needs a human to keep its wallet funded. Chrysalis earns more than it spends, deposits every payment into a yield-bearing vault, and uses the compound interest to fire its own queries — permanently. This is the complete self-funding flywheel that ampersend-sdk + Aave enables.
techStack: Aave v3 on Base Sepolia (real supply/withdraw)

veniceIntegration.role: strategic reasoning core — privately reasons over vault state using RISE-structured prompting to select growth-optimized research topics
veniceIntegration.promptFramework: RISE (Role-Input-Steps-Expectation) — agent assesses growth phase, identifies yield-accelerating research, prioritizes feedback-loop topics
veniceIntegration.privacy: vault financial state (principal, aToken balance, yield, efficiency metrics) is reasoned over privately — only the resulting on-chain transaction is public and verifiable
veniceIntegration.trigger: called by TreasuryAgent each time yield >= $0.08 threshold is detected

tracks: Ampersend — Best Agent Built with ampersend-sdk ($500)
Protocol Labs — Let the Agent Cook ($8,000)
